title: lastrea boryana
intro: Lastrea boryana, also known as the Bory's lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving liver function, and has been used to treat conditions such as fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of Lastrea boryana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or using a solvent to extract its active compounds.
